title: lonicera maximowiczii subsp. maximowiczii
intro: Lonicera maximowiczii subsp. maximowiczii, also known as Korean Honeysuckle, is a species of flowering plant in the family Caprifoliaceae. It is a shrub-like vine native to East Asia, valued for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant contains compounds like flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, inflammation, and respiratory issues, as well as to reduce stress and promote relaxation. Herbal preparations of Lonicera maximowiczii subsp. maximowiczii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
